_comment: Known totals and priority for coverage tracking. Indexed counts are auto-calculated by build_tags.py from llms-full.txt — do not edit those here. Update known_total when you discover a source's actual size. Use null when unknown.

What Works Clearinghouse.notes: Practice guides complete (29/29). Intervention reports: 619 total, ~471 remaining.

Digital Promise.notes: 222 remaining across 19 collections. Playwright-only — manual batches.

UChicago Consortium on School Research.notes: 319 publications. Not yet indexed. K-12 school improvement, equity, attendance.

Evidence for ESSA.notes: Strong + Moderate tiers indexed. Promising and Demonstrates a Rationale tiers remain. Total unknown.

NWEA.notes: 200+ publications confirmed (paginated). Not yet indexed. MAP Growth longitudinal research.

Mathematica.notes: IES-funded RCTs and quasi-experimental studies. Not yet indexed.

WestEd.notes: Federal regional lab. Not yet indexed.

TNTP.notes: 36 publications confirmed (4 JS-rendered pages, 10+10+10+6). WebFetch only sees page 1 (30 items) — listing requires Playwright or manual pagination. Teacher effectiveness research. Not yet indexed.

Journal of Educational Data Mining.notes: 30 indexed. New issues appear quarterly. Full back-catalog not yet assessed.

Journal of Learning Analytics.notes: 25 indexed (vols 9-12). Earlier volumes and new issues not yet indexed.

Campbell Collaboration.notes: 52 education systematic reviews total on one page. 27 remaining.

Learning Policy Institute.notes: 30 indexed. Hundreds more available across topic pages.

IES Regional Education Labs.notes: 30 indexed (3 per region). Each region has many more publications. Listing is JS-rendered; index individual publications by ID.

Brookings Institution.notes: 22 indexed from Brown Center on Education Policy. Curate manually — only Brown Center articles qualify.

CREDO at Stanford.notes: ~9 reports total (small catalog). Charter school effectiveness research. Not yet indexed.

National Academies of Sciences, Engineer.notes: 2 indexed (How People Learn I & II). 3-6 more landmark education reports identified.

Collaborative for Academic, Social, and.notes: 1 entry (SEL Framework). Essentially complete for current scope.
